name: Every alert must have a linked runbook
description: Alerts created in any monitoring system must reference a runbook that describes the healthy state, the sick state, the recovery procedure, and the escalation path. Alerts without a runbook link are denied activation.

policy.rationale: An alert without a runbook is noise — it wakes someone up without telling them what to do. Actionable alerts require a runbook; non-actionable alerts should not exist.
